description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch with a high, continuous backrest and gently flared armrests. The upholstery is a smooth, solid gray fabric that covers the entire exterior, giving it a sleek and understated appearance. The seat consists of three distinct, rectangular cushions that are integrated into the base, while the backrest and armrests are padded for comfort. The legs are short, straight, and dark-colored, slightly elevating the couch above the ground. The overall silhouette is clean and contemporary, with subtle curves at the armrests and a uniform back profile. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist design.
description: A modern gray three-seater couch with flared armrests, integrated seat cushions, and short, dark legs. The design is sleek and minimalist with a continuous high backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing three integrated seat cushions, high continuous backrest, and flared armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle outward flare of the armrest and the thickness of the seat and backrest padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panel and the subtle curve of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flared armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three integrated seat cushions in a row, no visible loose or accent pillows, backrest and armrests are padded and continuous.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, exposed legs in a dark color, likely wood or metal, with a simple block design.
attribute_armrest_design: Gently flared armrests that rise to the same height as the backrest, padded and fully upholstered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and padded backrest with no visible divisions or tufting, fully upholstered in matching fabric.
